brief.conclusion: 阿里云宣布推出Qwen-7B，这是一款轻量级但功能强大的多模态预训练模型。
brief.why_hot: 该模型的发布将降低中小企业和个人开发者使用高级AI技术的门槛。

brief.conclusion: 谷歌发布了Vertex AI Vision，一个用于构建计算机视觉应用的新平台。
brief.why_hot: 这标志着谷歌在简化AI开发流程方面迈出重要一步。

brief.conclusion: 微软更新了其Azure OpenAI服务，增加了对更多语言的支持和改进的安全特性。
brief.why_hot: 此举增强了Azure OpenAI在全球范围内的可用性和安全性。

brief.conclusion: 666ghj/MiroFish项目在GitHub上迅速获得关注，累计获得超过30,000颗星。
brief.why_hot: 该项目提供了一个简单而通用的群体智能引擎，能够预测多种未来事件。

brief.conclusion: thedotmack/claude-mem成为GitHub上的新热门项目，专注于为Claude AI助手添加记忆功能。
brief.why_hot: 它展示了如何通过增强AI的记忆能力来提升用户体验。

brief.conclusion: Galxe平台上线了Pi Day Quest #1活动，鼓励用户参与社交庆祝。
brief.why_hot: 此类Web3社区活动有助于增加用户粘性和社区活跃度。

brief.conclusion: Kommunitas.net发起了KOMmunity Learn with Troyvest活动，旨在教育社区成员关于区块链的知识。
brief.why_hot: 教育性质的Web3活动对于普及区块链技术和培养新用户至关重要。

github_trending.name: 666ghj/MiroFish
github_trending.description: A Simple and Universal Swarm Intelligence Engine, Predicting Anything. 简洁通用的群体智能引擎，预测万物

github_trending.name: thedotmack/claude-mem
github_trending.description: A Claude Code plugin that automatically captures everything Claude does during your coding sessions, compresses it with AI (using Claude's agent-sdk), and injects relevant context back into future sessions.

github_trending.name: Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad
github_trending.description: Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.

github_trending.name: obra/superpowers
github_trending.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

github_trending.name: abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
github_trending.description: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine -       GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

github_trending.name: lightpanda-io/browser
github_trending.description: Lightpanda: the headless browser designed for AI and automation

github_trending.name: volcengine/OpenViking
github_trending.description: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.

github_trending.name: shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code
github_trending.description: Bash is all you need -  A nano Claude Code–like agent, built from 0 to 1

github_trending.name: p-e-w/heretic
github_trending.description: Fully automatic censorship removal for language models

github_trending.name: langchain-ai/deepagents
github_trending.description: Agent harness built with LangChain and LangGraph. Equipped with a planning tool, a filesystem backend, and the ability to spawn subagents - well-equipped to handle complex agentic tasks.

github_trending.name: YishenTu/claudian
github_trending.description: An Obsidian plugin that embeds Claude Code as an AI collaborator in your vault

github_trending.name: voidzero-dev/vite-plus
github_trending.description: Vite+ is the unified toolchain and entry point for web development. It manages your runtime, package manager, and frontend toolchain in one place.

github_trending.name: dimensionalOS/dimos
github_trending.description: Dimensional is the agentic operating system for physical space. Vibecode humanoids, quadrupeds, drones, and other hardware platforms in natural language and build multi-agent systems that work seamlessly with physical input (cameras, lidar, actuators).

github_trending.name: topoteretes/cognee
github_trending.description: Knowledge Engine for AI Agent Memory in 6 lines of code
